title: XAU/USD just gave a textbook setup — here's how I validated it before entering
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Most traders saw the bounce and went long.

I almost did too.

But before entering, I ran a second check on the structure: — Price was trapped inside a supply zone (gray box) — Descending channel forming lower highs — EMA 200 way below — no support to catch a long

The setup was screaming short, not long.

Waited for confirmation. Entered. +$135 / RR 2.15.

Not because I'm smarter. Because I didn't let the "feeling" override the structure.

\[screenshot ici\]

How do you personally validate a setup before pulling the trigger?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
I've been building a tool that automates this second-check process.

You upload a chart screenshot, the AI analyzes the structure, identifies key levels and gives you a confidence score before you enter.

This trade was validated with it before I pulled the trigger.

Free to try : [https://herculmarket.com](https://herculmarket.com)
